scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --workspace @njstore/server" "npm run dev --workspace @njstore/store-client" "npm run dev --workspace @njstore/admin-client"
scripts.docker:mongo:up: docker compose up -d mongo mongo-setup redis
scripts.docker:mongo:down: docker compose stop mongo mongo-setup redis
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @njstore/types && npm run build --workspace @njstore/utils && npm run build --workspace @njstore/ui && npm run build --workspace @njstore/server && npm run build --workspace @njstore/store-client && npm run build --workspace @njstore/admin-client
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @njstore/types && npm run typecheck --workspace @njstore/utils && npm run typecheck --workspace @njstore/ui && npm run typecheck --workspace @njstore/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @njstore/store-client && npm run typecheck --workspace @njstore/admin-client
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @njstore/types && npm run test --workspace @njstore/utils && npm run test --workspace @njstore/ui && npm run test --workspace @njstore/server && npm run test --workspace @njstore/store-client && npm run test --workspace @njstore/admin-client
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @njstore/server && npm run lint --workspace @njstore/store-client && npm run lint --workspace @njstore/admin-client
